category_sources: Official GitHub repository description matches terminal-to-animated-SVG functionality.
source_facts.description: records, shares, and exports terminal sessions as animated SVG images.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface; no dedicated docs site was present in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/MrMarble/termsvg; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository description confirms animated SVG terminal recording.
